meaning: n.克朗(瑞典及冰岛的货币单位)
examples: The Icelandic krona is the official currency of Iceland.
The krona has ceased functioning as a currency outside Iceland.
Audur contributed 100 million krona ($775,000) to start the fund.
Go long the British pound, the Norwegian krone or the Swedish krona, while shorting the euro.
Say the krona strengthens to a ratio of eight to the euro--by 12.5%, in other words.
